nodes.title: Use TXT2IMG OR IMG2IMG
widgets_values:
In the "Img2Img" box, there's a "True/False" button called "Txt2Img / Img2Img."

-TRUE to use Txt2Img

-FALSE to use Img2Img

nodes.title: Use INPUT for BASE
widgets_values:
BASE is where you create your image. Since the values ​​are already set in START:

-Select the Layout on Image Size,
-Select the model you want to use,
-Add the Loras and their weights (if you don't need them, deactivate the node),
-Write your prompts, both positive and negative,
-Seed (or leave random),
-Step (totals + refiner), CFG, Sampler, and scheduler, (for these 4 parameters check what they recommend where you downloaded the model you are using).
-Denoise ONLY for Img2Img! For txt2Img let 1!
THESE ARE THE PARAMETERS YOU MUST ALWAYS CHOOSE!!!

nodes.title: Use STYLER
widgets_values: In the Prompt Positive and negative you can add your styles!

nodes.title: Use REFINER
widgets_values:
REFINER is for a better quality image.

-Write positive and negative prompt (only for quality, the words depend on the model you have, check where you dowload the model, usually they are words like "masterpiece", "high quality", etc)

If you don't need Refine, NO PROBLEM: Write the same value of steps in both "steps_totals" and "refiner_step"! (Refiner steps will be "steps_total"-"refiner_steps)

nodes.title: Use PROMPTER
widgets_values:
PROMPTER is for have text prompt from an image.

-Upload the image and GG! XD
-Choose your model (It depends on the type of image you use and the prompt you want to obtain).

If you don't need it, NO PROBLEM! On "Control" you can deactivate.

nodes.title: Use CONTROLNET/IPADAPTER
widgets_values:
CONTROLNET is for controlling pose, texture, or much more from a starting image. IPadpter for composition, style, face.
-Upload the image that you want start.
-Choose your model (It depends on whether you want a pose, lines, etc. and it depends on the format of your checkpoint - sd, sdxl, etc.).

You don't need it? NO PROBLEM! Just deactivate on "control".

nodes.title: Use DETAILER
widgets_values:
DETAILER is for a better quality image on face, body, etc.

Set the Denoise value, model and where you want the highest quality on "Detailer"

If you don't need Detailer, NO PROBLEM, there are two reasons:
- You don't want it: then OFF on "Detailer Control".
- You don't need it because you're not creating a person. Don't worry, it's smart and will automatically skip steps for you.

nodes.title: Use REMOVE BACKGROUND
widgets_values:
REMOVE BACKGROUND is for remove the background from your images.

If you don't need it, NO PROBLEM! "BYPASS" the "REMOVE BACKGROUND" block!

nodes.title: Use UPSCALER
widgets_values:
UPSCALER is to enlarge your image by adding quality.

-Choose the appropriate model for your image type.
-The denoise.
-And the "scale by" setting, when you want to enlarge: "0.5" equals x2, "1" equals x4.
-If you don't know what the other values ​​are, you can leave them as they are.
If you don't need the upscaler, NO PROBLEM, disable the entire "Upscaler" node family.

nodes.title: Use SAVER
widgets_values:
SAVE:
-In your first save, remember to set the "Output" folder of your Comfyui (or wherever you want to save, just copy/paste the path).

-Also set the name of your job, you can leave a generic name for any job or change it each time depending on what you create.

-With new version, you can choose on "Saver control" what you want save!
